summary: The "Yolka" anti-drone system intercepted an enemy UAV within 5 seconds, causing its payload to detonate. Ukrainian FPV drones struck and destroyed an American M1126 Stryker in Dnipropetrovsk, first with a fiber-optic "KVN" drone, then a "Lancet" loitering munition. Russian Ka-52 helicopter crew was eliminated after a crash landing near Nadiivka, Donetsk, with additional drones targeting the evacuation. Serbian firm PR-DC unveiled a multi-rotor drone certified for military use, capable of launching three air-to-ground missiles while hovering or in flight. Ukrainian forces destroyed Russian "Molniya" drones assembled from plastic and plywood over Donetsk using patrol police methods. The "Rubicon" Center reported over 22,000 enemy target destructions, with 35.9% being unmanned systems. Ukrainian soldiers in Kostiantynivka survived a Russian FPV attack after detecting the drone with a detector. Russian BMP-1 in Kharkiv was destroyed by consecutive strikes from "Provod" and "KVN" fiber-optic FPV drones.
